title: Greppem Freight
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Greppem Freight''' was a transport and supply company that supplied the [[Liberty Task Force]] after the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] arranged a contract with [[Dunari]].

==Behind the scenes==
Craft of that company are seen in mission 5:2 of the game, if the player identifies the craft escorting the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']], before proceeding to the hyperspace and the main objective of the mission. They exist purely to add realism and consistency to the game (indeed the previous mission 5:1 concerned the arrangement of supplying procedures between the Alliance and Dunari)

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
